label: Kota hostel room at night
setting_prompt: Small rented hostel room in Kota, Rajasthan at around 1:30am. Harsh white tube light mixed with one weak study lamp. Bed is unmade. Physics and chemistry books are open. Water bottle, cheap backpack, charger cable, and scribbled notes are visible. The room should feel cramped, real, slightly messy, and lived in by a stressed class 12 student.
visual_rules: Keep the realism ordinary and local.
